story: When I grew up beside Alya, we shared chores, bread, and market days, and I wanted to make us official. She loved the sea, so I saved and bought a strip of cliff. I started a small house there, enlisting friends to help. The work was slow—mortar cracked, fences slumped—but at last an official signed off. I asked her father’s blessing in the wind, rented a carriage, and told Alya that I had an errand and would love her company.
implausible_knowledge: I started a small house there, enlisting friends to help
question: When he invites her on an unexplained carriage ride, how will Alya prepare before they depart?
answer_with_knowledge: Pack a trunk for a seaside stay at the cliff house and prepare to move in
answer_without_knowledge: Finish her chores and come along with no luggage, treating it like a routine outing
